audit_items.proof_trace: Function can return NULL if invalid CompressType hits default case and SCHECK(false) returns instead of terminating (e.g. with custom log handler). Callers directly use return value in scoped_ptr without NULL checking before calling os->Flush().
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker sends network message with invalid compression type value → SCHECK(false) returns → NULL returned → NULL pointer dereference crash in os->Flush().
